Created attachment 214228
patch

Simple update to 5.44.5

Program changelog (https://lalescu.ro/liviu/fet/news.html):
* bug fix: the program froze when hiding rows or columns in the activity planning dialog. This bug was introduced in version 5.43.0.
* bug fix: when using constraints activity tags not overlapping with the activity tags names containing the special characters
* minor fixes and code cleanup and improvents
* updated the Arabic translation
